post.content:
Given a string, generate all the possible expressions from it.
Example:
Input:  3481
Output:
```
3+4+8+1
3+4-8+1
34+8+1
3*4/8+1
348+1
and so on
```
Operators allowed: `+`, `-`, `*`, `/`
(Phone Interview, was asked to run the code)
https://leetcode.com/playground/TYVGMHZv - Backtracking \nEdge cases: Divide by zero. \nI suggest validation of completed expression  we present to the interviewer.
Seems like a brute force problem with complexity O(n*5<sup>n-1</sup>). There are n-1 gaps and we have 5 options in each gap - {no operation, +, -, *, /}.
was it oa or phone interview?\ndid they asked only 1 question?
